title: Flow-Lenia Parameter Localization as Closest Analogue

content.finding: Flow-Lenia parameter localization (making global CA parameters per-cell) is the closest published analogue to our per-cell alpha adaptation approach
content.evidence: Literature scan of Lenia, Neural CAs, POET, meta-learning CAs, and open-ended evolution systems
implications: Our Stage 2-3 work (per-cell alpha) aligns with known successful patterns
But Flow-Lenia still uses external loss functions — they haven't solved Principle II
No published work has achieved self-referential modification without external evaluation
